title: PM Modi Chairs High-Level CCS Meeting Amid Escalating U.S.-Israel-Iran Conflict
description: The session is attended by senior cabinet members, including Rajnath Singh, Amit Shah, S. Jaishankar, and Nirmala Sitharaman, alongside several other union ministers. Also joining the strategy session are National Security Adviser Ajit Doval, Principal Secretaries P. K. Mishra and Shaktikanta Da.
